append_from_a_url_truncate_or_delete_row: Append from a URL, truncate, or delete rows by condition in a Tinybird Data Source.
call_a_published_tinybird_pipe_api_endpo: Call a published Tinybird Pipe API Endpoint with dynamic parameters and return the result.
column_metadata_for_the_result_set_only_: Column metadata for the result set: [{name, type}] (only with FORMAT JSON)
data_to_send_as_json_or_ndjson_string: Data to send as JSON or NDJSON string
describe_the_pipe_parameters_to_pass: Describe the Pipe parameters to pass
dynamic_pipe_parameters_as_a_json_object: Dynamic Pipe parameters as a JSON object
format_of_the_events_ndjson_or_json: Format of the events (ndjson or json)
full_job_details_kind_id_status_datasour: Full job details: kind, id, status, datasource, rows_affected (append/delete)
interact_with_tinybird_stream_json_or_nd: Interact with Tinybird: stream JSON or NDJSON events with the Events API, run SQL with the Query API, call published Pipe API Endpoints by name with dynamic parameters, and manage Data Sources by appending from a URL, truncating, or deleting rows by condition.
minimum_rows_without_a_limit_clause_only: Minimum rows without a LIMIT clause (only with FORMAT JSON)
name_of_the_tinybird_data_source: Name of the Tinybird Data Source
number_of_rows_returned_only_with_format: Number of rows returned (only with FORMAT JSON)
optional_sql_to_run_on_top_of_the: Optional SQL to run on top of the Pipe result
query_execution_statistics_elapsed_time_: Query execution statistics - elapsed time, rows read, bytes read (only with FORMAT JSON)
query_result_data_format_json_array_of_o: Query result data. FORMAT JSON: array of objects. Other formats (CSV, TSV, etc.): raw text string.
raw_truncate_response_body_if_any: Raw truncate response body, if any
run_an_ad_hoc_sql_query_against_tinybird: Run an ad-hoc SQL query against Tinybird with the Query API and return results.
select_from_my_pipe_format_json_or_selec:
SELECT * FROM my_pipe FORMAT JSON
OR
SELECT * FROM my_pipe FORMAT CSV
send_events_query_data_and_manage_data_s: Send events, query data, and manage Data Sources with Tinybird
sql_condition_selecting_rows_to_delete: SQL condition selecting rows to delete
stream_json_or_ndjson_events_into_a_tiny: Stream JSON or NDJSON events into a Tinybird Data Source via the Events API.
test_the_delete_without_removing_data: Test the delete without removing data
url_of_the_file_to_append: URL of the file to append
whether_the_data_source_was_truncated: Whether the Data Source was truncated
